sourceRef.citation: Abdul Razzaq, Dr. Ghulam Dastgir, Dr. Khaliq Hussain et al. 2026

statement.en: EXPLORING STRENGTHS AND WEAKNESSES OF TECHNOLOGY INTEGRATION IN TEACHING PRACTICES

proposer: Abdul Razzaq, Dr. Ghulam Dastgir, Dr. Khaliq Hussain

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The axiom describes an empirical survey/meta-analysis of technology integration in pedagogy. This is provisional knowledge: findings are context-dependent (institutional, cultural, temporal variables), methodology-sensitive, and subject to revision as educational practices and technology evolve. No universal truth-claim is defensible; the work documents current state rather than establishing invariant facts.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 技術の加速は摩擦に抗して教育を浮かせるが、積分されてこそ。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 理想と現実の間を揺らぐ軌跡—ときに光り、ときに沈む。
